title: Closeout Report — MPC as a Layer 2 Service to Cardano
executive_summary: This Proof of Concept demonstrates that Cardano smart contracts (Aiken) can coordinate with Partisia Blockchain's MPC infrastructure to run privacy-preserving analytics on personal data. The PoC implements a complete cross-chain architecture: an Aiken validator on Cardano Preprod records the MPC computation request, an off-chain relay bridges the request to Partisia Blockchain, a ZK MPC contract on PBC testnet receives secret user data and computes an aggregate result, and the result is displayed without exposing any individual data at any layer.

milestones.title: Aiken Smart Contract on Cardano
deliverables: Aiken MpcRequest validator with InitiateMPC redeemer
6 unit tests (all passing via aiken check)
Deployed to Cardano Preprod with inline datum

milestones.title: Partisia ZK Contract + Off-Chain Relay
deliverables: PBC ZK contract (contract.rs + zk_compute.rs) with age_threshold and survey_match computations
9 unit tests (all passing via cargo test)
Off-chain relay (relay.ts) polling Blockfrost and bridging to PBC
Contract deployed to PBC testnet via browser

milestones.title: Secret Input Flow & Privacy Verification
deliverables: Synthetic dataset (50 users, 35 over age 18, 28 survey=true)
Real secret submission via PBC TypeScript SDK — 5 confirmed on-chain ZK transactions
Privacy verification: no individual data in contract state, secret tab, logs, or relay output

milestones.title: MPC Computation + Result Display + E2E + Closeout
deliverables: show_result.ts fetches live PBC state via REST API, decodes ProfilaMpcState from on-chain binary
trigger_computation.ts documents computation trigger (browser-based due to CLI limitation)
5 real secret-input transactions submitted to PBC contract via @partisiablockchain/zk-client SDK
result-display.html with cross-chain evidence and live on-chain state
E2E run log documenting all 6 stages with real TX hashes

layer_1.role: On-chain anchor for MPC computation request

bridge.role: Polls Blockfrost for new UTxOs, parses datum, bridges to PBC

layer_2.role: Receives secret inputs via MPC secret sharing, computes aggregate result

key_achievements: Demonstrated Cardano-to-PBC cross-chain coordination via off-chain relay
Deployed a ZK MPC contract on PBC testnet with verifiable on-chain state
Submitted 5 real ZK secret-input transactions via @partisiablockchain/zk-client TypeScript SDK
Proved that secret user data never appears in any on-chain state, log, or output
Built binary state decoder that reads ProfilaMpcState directly from PBC REST API
Created comprehensive evidence trail with real TX hashes on both chains

technical_notes.pbc_cli_limitation: The cargo pbc transaction CLI returns HTTP 400 for all transaction types on PBC testnet (verified with official example contracts). Contract deployment uses the PBC testnet browser. Secret input submission uses the PBC TypeScript SDK.
technical_notes.pbc_typescript_sdk: Secret inputs submitted programmatically via @partisiablockchain/zk-client (RealZkClient.buildOnChainInputTransaction) + @partisiablockchain/blockchain-api-transaction-client (BlockchainTransactionClient.signAndSend). Each transaction encrypts the secret for all 4 MPC engines.
technical_notes.pbc_sdk_version: v.16.126.0 (binder 11.9.0) — upgraded from v15.1.0 for testnet binder compatibility
technical_notes.pbc_rest_api: Contract state accessible via GET /chain/contracts/{address} — the /blockchain/contracts/ endpoint returns 404
technical_notes.binary_state_decoding: ProfilaMpcState decoded by locating the administrator address anchor in the serializedContract base64 blob, then reading fields sequentially per PBC's ReadWriteState format
technical_notes.secret_submissions: 5 real on-chain ZK secret-input transactions submitted via PBC TypeScript SDK. Each transaction creates encrypted shares for the 4 MPC engines. Transaction hashes verifiable on PBC testnet browser.

repository.total_files: ~30 source files across cardano/, partisia/, relay/, test-data/, docs/

future_work: Integrate PBC TypeScript SDK for programmatic computation trigger (start_computation action)
Add Cardano result callback (write MPC result back to Cardano UTxO)
Production deployment with real Profila user data (with consent)
Multi-query support (run age_threshold and survey_match in parallel)
Mainnet deployment on both Cardano and PBC
